THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOTH, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEVICK, SCOTT $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.58 INTEREST, $89.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,275.08, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
